mapper.sql: person_id, person_type, achievements, evaluation, anecdotes, sources, extra_field1, extra_field2, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO person_extend (person_id, person_type, achievements, evaluation, anecdotes, sources, extra_field1, extra_field2) VALUES (#{personId}, #{personType}, #{achievements}, #{evaluation}, #{anecdotes}, #{sources}, #{extraField1}, #{extraField2}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE person_type = #{personType}, achievements = #{achievements}, evaluation = #{evaluation}, anecdotes = #{anecdotes}, sources = #{sources}, extra_field1 = #{extraField1}, extra_field2 = #{extraField2}
